Source metadata.filename: 2022TW_Report of the Senior Citizen Condition Survey.pdf
Source metadata.evidence_original: 本調查係依據老人福利法第10條規定辦理，主要為制定老人福利政策及相關福利措施，須瞭解55歲至64歲的生活狀況。
Source metadata.evidence_translated: This survey is conducted in accordance with the provisions of the Elderly Welfare Act, primarily to formulate elderly welfare policies and related welfare measures, and to understand the living conditions of those aged 55 to 64.
